web.title: Waterfront Luxury Condos For Sale West Palm Beach | ALBA Palm ...
web.description: With only 55 total residences tucked away in a quiet residential neighborhood, Alba is a rare glimpse at South Florida waterfront living the way it should be.
web.markdown:
[Skip to content](https://www.albapalmbeach.com/#content)

![Alba Palm Beach Residence](https://www.albapalmbeach.com/wp-content/uploads/alba-logo-footer-white.png)

# Alba Palm Beach

For all those who have ever wished for coastal living that is as effortless as it is elegant, a new day is dawning at Alba Palm Beach. Blissful days in the sun, chic evenings of world-class culture and entertainment, and an unmatched sense of serenity can be yours like never before.

#### Limited-Edition Living

### Waterfront Reimagined

Intimately sized, graciously appointed, and flawlessly located directly on the Intracoastal, Alba is a dramatic step forward for life on the water in South Florida. Only 55 total residences share a private piece of the coast to call their own, with more than 25,000 square feet of dedicated amenity spaces that redefine the standard of luxury.

#### [EXPLORE THE VISION](https://www.albapalmbeach.com/vision)

![Alba Palm Beach Condo](https://www.albapalmbeach.com/wp-content/uploads/exterior-sketch.jpg)

Credit: SPINA O'ROURKE + PARTNERS

![Luxury Condos For Sale West Palm Beach](https://www.albapalmbeach.com/wp-content/uploads/clock-tower.jpg)

#### THE LOCATION

### Exclusivity Meets Authenticity

Just far enough away from crowded beaches and the tourist scene, yet conveniently close to a world of upscale culinary spots, designer shopping, art galleries and museums, theatrical performances, and more – Alba Palm Beach is a reflection of the true South Florida lifestyle. There is a charming neighborhood feeling here next to the water with dazzling views of the Palm Beach skyline just off your back terrace. More than you expected? Perhaps. But it is exactly what you deserve.

#### [EXPLORE THE LOCATION](https://www.albapalmbeach.com/location)

![New Palm Beach Condos](https://www.albapalmbeach.com/wp-content/uploads/Alba-Map-Icons-Palm-Trees.png)

### Limited-Edition Living

With only 55 total residences tucked away in a quiet residential neighborhood, Alba is a rare glimpse at South Florida waterfront living the way it should be. Spacious 2- and 3-bedroom layouts and 4-bedroom townhomes overlook the gentle waves of the Intracoastal Waterway.

#### [EXPLORE THE RESIDENCES](https://www.albapalmbeach.com/residences)

![Kenneth A. Baboun - Alba Palm Beach](https://www.albapalmbeach.com/wp-content/uploads/AlbaDevelopers02-22_82_grayscale-1.png)

![Alba Palm Beach](https://www.albapalmbeach.com/wp-content/uploads/Gray-Outline@4x-8-1.png)

#### Developing Differently

### A Fresh Vision

After successfully creating dozens of high-end condominium towers and communities throughout Florida and beyond, the team behind Alba saw an unmet lifestyle in the marketplace. Envisioned as a departure from crowded mega towers, but with the same extraordinary levels of architecture, design, and amenities experiences, Alba is a landmark for the future of West Palm Beach.

#### [Meet the Team](https://www.albapalmbeach.com/team)

## Paradise Has Finally Found Its Way Home.

![Condominium West Palm Beach](https://www.albapalmbeach.com/wp-content/uploads/Alba-Map-Icons-Clock-Tower-1.png)

All-New Residences. Boutique Exclusivity. On the Water.

Starting just under $3 Million

## Sales team

## An Exclusive Developmentin West Palm Beach

Here in a quiet neighborhood directly on the Intracoastal Waterway, just moments from the beaches, Worth Avenue, Atlantic Ocean boating, and other chic highlights of West Palm Beach, a limited collection of modern condominium and townhome residences invites you to see a different side of waterfront living, with delivery anticipated for Spring 2026.

Features

+

Spacious layouts with half-baths in select residences


Den/Media Room in select floorplans


Oversized glass-framed terraces with panoramic views


Summer kitchens on all terraces


Floor-to-ceiling hurricane impact windows


Hurricane impact sliding doors for indoor outdoor living


Italian-Designed Kitchens By Italkraft

Professional grade SubZero® And Wolf® Appliances

Spa-like baths with designer fixtures and finishes


Pre-wired for high-speed data, media connectivity and smart-home technology


A limited collection of two- and three-story townhomes


Townhomes have Direct water position and view


Select townhome residences include private plunge pool


Select townhome residences include private hot tub


Amenities

+

Covered porte cochère


Landscaped arrival and entrance


Curated art and relaxation garden


Dramatic lobby with open lounge areas


Dog spa and grooming station


Private and secure dog run


Mailroom with cold storage lockers and package room


Private storage units


Assigned parking


Bicycle storage


State-of-the-art fitness by TechnoGym with weights, cardio, resistance training, yoga and pilates overlooking the Intracoastal


Luxury spa with his and hers sauna, steam, cold shower experience, treatment room, and lockers


Private massage treatment room


Great room, stylish cocktail lounge and entertainment spaces


Private dining room with climate controlled owners’ wine storage


Catering kitchen and bar for private events


Outdoor entertaining kitchen with BBQ


Communal dining table


Screening Room


Bocce Ball court



Private tele-conference spaces and work spaces


Conference room with state-of-the-art audio visual functionality


Sunrise pool overlooking the Intracoastal and unobstructed views


Sunset pool capturing that warm afternoon sun



Expansive pool decks with cabanas and lounge areas


Private dock with boat slips


On-site security and surveillance


Valet services



EV charging station-ready\*


Staffed lobby


Towel service


On-site property management



Concierge services


Full-floor with over 25,000 square feet dedicated to amenities
